title: Minescape Utility
description: Gives the Minescape.com server a more authentic OSRS look and feel.
body:
Gives the Minescape.com server a more authentic OSRS look and feel.

- Adds an Exp/Hour counter and a skills overlay.
- Adds a usable runescape style inventory(including inventory, equipment screen, and skills tab)
- Adds exp drop orbs
- Adds Right click menus to items and skills
- Adds custom model armor overrides
- Adds hp/prayer bars on either side of inventory
- Adds mod hitbox highlights
- Adds a browser
    Most streaming services not supported excluding YouTube
- Adds red vegnitte for low health
- Custom inventory needs to be remapped settings
